prompt: Conceal the open menu, revealing the underlying browser tab content as if the menu never appeared.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Conceal the entire open browser menu and its 'Developer Tools' sub-menu, both located on the right side of the image. Seamlessly extend the underlying browser tab content – including the view of Earth, the dark website header, and the browser's top bar – to fill the area where the menus were, making it appear as if the menus were never opened.
objects: view of Earth through a spacecraft window
navigation links on the website header (e.g., HOME, MS-24, CREW-8, SHENZHOU-17)
"WHO IS IN SPACE?" text with helmet icon
open browser menu (should not be present)
'Developer Tools' sub-menu and console (should not be present)
